      <description><![CDATA[Good morning! Today’s 11:11 edition tracks the RBI's policy decisions, a proposed relief for MSMEs, and a new banking data portal.       <description><![CDATA[The Financial Services Secretary said the proposed Banking Committee for Viksit Bharat will have a wide mandate, including examining whether India’s regulatory capital framework needs greater flexibility and whether further public sector bank consolidation could help create globally competitive lenders.]]></description>
